summary: Comprehensive testing of Pharmacy Management MVP (Cashier + Storage). 11/11 backend pytest tests pass. Frontend Cashier flow: items grid, search, add-to-cart, +/- buttons, total in IQD, checkout, sale summary dialog, stock decrement — all verified. Storage CRUD (create/edit/delete) and navigation verified. No critical issues found.

issues: Minor: when navigating from Storage to Cashier, the cashier page may briefly show 'Items (0)' before items load (race between mount and GET /api/items). Items appear correctly on full reload. Consider showing a loader state.

action_items: Optional: Add a loading skeleton on Cashier items grid to avoid brief 'Items (0)' flash on first paint after route change.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is used inside seed_db() before being defined later in the file (logger = logging.getLogger(__name__) appears after the @app.on_event('startup') handler). This works only because seed runs after module import completes, but is fragile — move logging.basicConfig and logger definition above seed_db to be safe.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup') — consider migrating to lifespan context manager for FastAPI >=0.110.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True; browsers will reject credentialed requests. Acceptable for this no-auth MVP but should be tightened later.
Search query uses raw user input directly in $regex — special regex characters could cause errors. Consider re.escape() on the search string.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 12 pharmacy items on first startup (verified). Tests create TEST_ prefixed items and clean them up afterward.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend BASE_URL = REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Backend testids: cashier-item-{id}, cart-item-{id}, cart-qty-{id}, cart-inc-{id}, cart-dec-{id}, cart-total, checkout-button, sale-summary-dialog, summary-close, storage-row-{id}, edit-{id}, delete-{id}, form-name-input/form-type-input/form-buy-input/form-sell-input/form-supplier-input/form-stock-input/form-barcode-input, form-submit, delete-confirm. Use page.wait_for_selector instead of networkidle (networkidle times out due to WDS websocket). Currency formatter outputs '{n,000} IQD' with locale commas.
